title: IBM Sinks Most Since 2000 as Anthropic Touts Cobol Tool
description: International Business Machines Corp. shares had their worst day in more than 25 years on Monday, after AI startup Anthropic PBC said its Claude Code tool can help modernize Cobol, a dated programming language that’s run on IBM computers.
content: International Business Machines Corp. shares had their worst day in more than 25 years on Monday, after AI startup Anthropic PBC said its Claude Code tool can help modernize Cobol, a dated programming language that’s run on IBM computers.
